## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [DISCLAIMER](../DISCLAIMER.md).
- [ ] I agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md) and have added myself to `CONTRIBUTORS.md` (first PR only).
- [ ] All my commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Frontend builds (`bun run build`) and type-checks (`bun run check`).
- [ ] Rust builds, tests pass, and clippy is clean (`-D warnings`).
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or `*.cred.json` / `cookies.json` are included.
- [ ] The change respects the forward-only layer order and the noncommercial / no-spam posture.
